sql_examples.executive: SELECT title, metric, story FROM story_cards ORDER BY title;
sql_examples.spatial: SELECT layer_name, feature_count, line_length_km FROM spatial_layers WHERE status = 'read' ORDER BY feature_count DESC LIMIT 8;
sql_examples.map: SELECT feature_group, geometry_type, coordinates_json FROM map_surface_features ORDER BY feature_group, feature_id;
sql_examples.network: SELECT category, length_km, ducar_scope FROM uganda_network_categories ORDER BY length_km DESC;
sql_examples.latest_road_master: SELECT ducar_class, record_count FROM uganda_road_master_class_summary ORDER BY record_count DESC;
sql_examples.global_cases: SELECT country, region, framework_lens, transferability_score FROM global_country_reviews ORDER BY transferability_score DESC;
sql_examples.pims: SELECT title, phase, readiness_score FROM pims_framework_steps ORDER BY step_order;
sql_examples.hdm4: SELECT indicator, readiness_score FROM hdm4_indicators ORDER BY readiness_score DESC;
sql_examples.raw_tables: SELECT table_group, table_name, COUNT(*) AS cells FROM raw_table_cells GROUP BY table_group, table_name ORDER BY cells DESC;
